case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION VS. JOHNNY WONG et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR APR-11-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE IS GRANTED, FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (212)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-25-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, JOHNNY $18,784.65 PRINCIPAL, $463.18 INTEREST, $388.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,635.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $388.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JOHNNY

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JOHNNY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-02-2010
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: OSTERMAN, PETER R ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 25, 2013, TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS WITH DEPARTMENT 302 BY APRIL 16. PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER TO THE PAPERS REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. MOVING PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE LOCAL RULE MAY RESULT IN THE MOTION BEING DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.
